data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for a form version audit trail per booking, which is explicitly stated in the linked use case. However, the prior steps do not provide any evidence of an audit trail being implemented or accessible through API reads or state checks. This lack of evidence indicates a clear gap in meeting the requirement, as no concrete data or functionality related to the audit trail was presented.
gaps: No evidence of form version audit trail functionality.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
